title: Assertion `(p->flags & ~(MEM_Null|MEM_Term|MEM_Subtype|MEM_FromBind |MEM_Dyn|MEM_Ephem|MEM_Static))==0' failed.
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE v2 USING fts4(v5, v3);

CREATE TRIGGER BEFORE INSERT ON v0 BEGIN DELETE FROM v0
WHERE(SELECT v2 FROM v2 ORDER BY v5);
key_bug_features: Trigger before insert on table with virtual table reference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE v0(v1 REAL NOT NULL, v2 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE v2 USING fts4(v5 TEXT, v3 INTEGER);
CREATE TRIGGER BEFORE INSERT ON v0 BEGIN DELETE FROM v0 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v2 WHERE v3 IS NOT NULL);
